title: Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky says his 30-day warranty is all about trust
summary: ﻿Pebble is also ‘looking into’ offering parts for DIY repairs. ﻿Pebble is also ‘looking into’ offering parts for DIY repairs. People have also reported running into hardware issues early on, like the front glass cracking on the Pebble Time 2.
